'''Panky's''' was a [[Restaurant/Legends|diner]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Barlok/Legends|Barlok]]. It used a [[WA-2 waitress droid]] and served such items as [[prisht fruit]] salad, [[bribb juice]], [[tarsh maxer]]s, and [[Corellian noale]]. It had a [[duskwood]] bartop and was rated triple-porken. Tarsh maxers were the headliners on the menu.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]],<ref name="OF Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].</ref> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and [[Lorana Jinzler]] [[Diet/Legends|ate]] at Panky's. While at the diner, the Jedi encountered [[Jerv Riske]], the [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] of [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]], the [[Magistrate/Legends|Magistrate]] of the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

==Behind the scenes==
Panky's appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s [[2006]] novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
